command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
# Run bridge directly to see the error
python3 runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py 2>&1 | head -20
echo '---'
# Check what lines 610-630 look like in bridge
sed -n '610,635p' runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py
ENDSSH
